stages.title: Grant authoring fundability export submission delta
stages.summary: Default MAG cognitive-kernel stage for ordinary grant authoring, fundability, export, or submission-gate movement.
stages.goal: Produce the next grant proposal, fundability review, export package, or submission-gate artifact delta, then return a MAG owner receipt or stable typed blocker.

notes: MAG keeps one ordinary golden path for authoring, fundability, export, and submission-gate deltas.
Submission-ready export is a domain or human owner gate, not an OPL semantic verdict or default proof lane.
